1 United with, meeting.
2 Attached or devoted to, fond of;  Ś. 5. 11 ;  R. 19. 16 ;  M. 4. 2 ;  Bg. 3. 26 ; 14. 15.

5 Continuous, uninterrupted;  Ki. 14. 59.
